best_match.name: Two Block
best_match.reason: The Two Block style is trendy and suits a youthful and fresh vibe, enhancing the round face shape by adding structure.

good_options.name: Comma Hair
good_options.reason: Adds a modern twist and frames the round face well.

good_options.name: Curtain Bangs (male)
good_options.reason: Offers a stylish yet relaxed look suitable for straight hair.

good_options.name: Side Part
good_options.reason: Classic and versatile, works well with medium-density hair.

not_recommended.name: Mullet
not_recommended.reason: The style's volume at the back isn’t ideal for a round face.

not_recommended.name: Mohawk
not_recommended.reason: Too bold and doesn’t complement the facial structure.

not_recommended.name: Man Bun
not_recommended.reason: May elongate the face lesser with insufficient hair length.

analysis.parting_recommendation: A natural side part to add asymmetry for balance.
analysis.fringe_recommendation: Opt for light, textured fringes to soften the face outline.

length_options.short_verdict: Great for a clean and defined look.
length_options.long_verdict: Less recommended as it might overwhelm the features.

avoid.name: Honey Blonde
avoid.reason: May clash with the cool undertones.

avoid.name: Light Auburn
avoid.reason: Too warm for a winter personal color profile.

analysis.summary: The Two Block haircut suits youthful and fresh styles, adding structure to a round face shape. Complementing cool undertones, recommended colors enhance the natural hair color. Opt for short to medium lengths for versatility.
care_tips: Use a lightweight styling cream to maintain shape without weighing hair down.
Regular trims every 4-6 weeks to retain the desired length and style.
Moisturizing shampoo and conditioner to keep straight hair smooth and manageable.
